recommendations.title: The Time to Live and the Time to Die
recommendations.overview: An autobiographical film based on Taiwanese director Hou Hsiao-hsien's memories of his youth growing up in Taiwan after emigrating from mainland China.

recommendations.title: Three Times
recommendations.overview: In three separate segments, set respectively in 1966, 1911, and 2005, three love stories unfold between three sets of characters, under three different periods of Taiwanese history and governance.

recommendations.title: A City of Sadness
recommendations.overview: The story of a family embroiled in the "White Terror," the Kuomintang government's anti-communist political repression that was wrought on the Taiwanese people from 1947-1987.

recommendations.title: Millennium Mambo
recommendations.overview: Vicky recalls her romances with her exes Hao Hao and Jack in the neon-lit clubs of Taipei.

recommendations.title: Dust in the Wind
recommendations.overview: A-yuan and A-yun are both from the small mining town of Jio-fen. They move to Taipei, where A-yuan is an apprentice by day and goes to night school, and A-yun works as a helper at a tailors. Everyone thinks they are meant for each other, and so do th

recommendations.title: Flowers of Shanghai
recommendations.overview: At the end of the 19th century, Shanghai is divided into several foreign concessions. In the British concession, a number of luxurious “flower houses” are reserved for the male elite of the city. Since Chinese dignitaries are not allowed to frequent

recommendations.title: House of Flying Daggers
recommendations.overview: In 9th century China, a corrupt government wages war against a rebel army called the Flying Daggers. A romantic warrior breaks a beautiful rebel out of prison to help her rejoin her fellows, but things are not what they seem.

recommendations.title: To Each His Own Cinema
recommendations.overview: Commissioned to mark the 60th anniversary of the Cannes Film Festival, "To Each His Own Cinema" brought together 33 of the world's pre-eminent filmmakers to produce short pieces exploring the multifarious facets of cinema and their perspective on the
recommendations.director: Raymond Depardon, Andrei Konchalovsky, Lars von Trier, Chen Kaige, Michael Cimino, Atom Egoyan, Wim Wenders, Manoel de Oliveira, Hou Hsiao-hsien, Jean-Pierre Dardenne, Jane Campion, Zhang Yimou, Ken Loach, Nanni Moretti, Elia Suleiman, Alejandro G. Iñárritu, Wong Kar-Wai, Walter Salles, David Cronenberg, Theo Angelopoulos, Olivier Assayas, Abbas Kiarostami, Roman Polanski, Youssef Chahine, David Lynch, Raúl Ruiz, Amos Gitai, Takeshi Kitano, Gus Van Sant, Claude Lelouch, Tsai Ming-liang, Joel Coen, Luc Dardenne, Bille August, Ethan Coen, Aki Kaurismäki

recommendations.title: Sansho the Bailiff
recommendations.overview: In 11th-century feudal Japan, following the exile of an idealistic governor, his wife and children are separated by slave traders; the children, Zushio and Anju, are sold into brutal servitude under the cruel bailiff Sansho.

recommendations.title: Baaghi
recommendations.overview: Ronny is a rebellious man, who falls in love with Sia but circumstances separate them. Years later, Ronny learns that Sia is abducted by a martial arts champion, Raghav.
